specific_question: Is Lee's Market currently developing Lot code tracing infrastructure for receiving, stocking, transforming, and selling products?
answer: As of Augst 2025, Lee's Market is on track to launch the LeeLots internal Lot code tracking system in Q2 2026, which will enable real-time tracking of products as they're received, stocked, transformed into other products, or sold to customers.
dr_question: How is Lee's Market positioned to communicate with all of its suppliers, big and small, concerning FSMA 204 regulations, specifically the tracking of Lot codes?
